name: Shield of the Cavalier
description: While holding this Shield, you have a +2 bonus to Armor Class. This bonus is in addition to the Shield's normal bonus to AC.

forceful_bash.effect: Make one attack roll with Shield against target within 5 feet
forceful_bash.damage: 2d6 + 2 Force damage plus Strength modifier on hit
forceful_bash.push: Push target up to 10 feet directly away
forceful_bash.knockdown: Creature your size or smaller: also knock Prone

protective_field.trigger: You or ally within 5 feet targeted by attack or area saving throw
protective_field.emanation_effect: Creatures/objects not fully contained pushed to nearest unoccupied spaces
protective_field.protection: Attack/area effect has no effect on creatures/objects inside Emanation
protective_field.isolation: Nothing enters or exits Emanation, creatures inside can't damage outside or vice versa
